Division

MACSI Division

Special materials and plant components

This division specializes in advanced industrial materials, including technical ceramics, corrosion- and heat-resistant alloys, wear-resistant materials, and special plant components.

Technical expertise in applications, materials, and components makes EURACCIAI a reliable partner to develop the most appropriate solutions together with customers.

The division supports selecting the right material and component for durability, reliability, maintenance, and total operating cost.

Contact
Contents

Products and partners listed for this division

COORSTEK - USA

Leading manufacturer of technical ceramics for advanced industrial applications.

https://www.coorstek.com

STEINHAUS - Germany

Precision filtering grids and cylinders; laminated conveyor belts for tunnel furnaces.

https://www.steinhaus-gmbh.de

ULBRICH - USA

Production and distribution of strips, sheets, and wires in stainless steels and special metals.

https://www.ulbrich.com

HARALD PIHL - Sweden

Broad availability of special alloys and titanium for critical industrial needs.

https://www.haraldpihl.com

ABREMA - Greece

Special components and materials for technical and plant-engineering applications.
